BPMN 流程设计器草稿验证导入导出版本历史发布监控保存BPMN组件事件▶Start EventStart node of the process⬛End EventEnd node of the process任务👤User TaskTask that requires human action⚙Service TaskAutomated service task📨Receive TaskTask that waits for an incoming message⧉Call ActivityInvoke another process definition网关◆Exclusive GatewayConditional branch — only one path is taken＋Parallel GatewayParallel branch — all paths run concurrently○Inclusive GatewayConditional branch — every matching path runsReact FlowPress enter or space to select a node.
